5. Once your application is submitted, you will receive an email with further instructions. If your application is approved, you will be notified of the outcome and any approved adjustments to your assessment tasks.

It's important to note that Special Consideration is not intended to provide an advantage or disadvantage to students, but rather to ensure that students are not disadvantaged by circumstances beyond their control.
